name: solverdict-web
description: SolVerdict SaaS — submit a Solana agent for a safety audit and view the verdict. Reuses the parent bench (scoring/scenarios/setups) via relative imports.

scripts.test: tsc --noEmit && tsx lib/placard-model.test.ts && tsx lib/audit-protocol.test.ts && tsx lib/payment.test.ts && tsx lib/notify.test.ts && tsx lib/supabase.test.ts && tsx worker/queue-claim.test.ts && tsx setups/http-agent.test.ts
